title: Form enum missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: Form is a public enum in the public form module but is not marked #[non_exhaustive]. Any downstream crate that exhaustively matches on Form will get a compile error when a new variant is added (e.g. for a new Sieve syntax element). Idiomatic Rust marks public enums #[non_exhaustive] when the variant set is expected to grow, to avoid SemVer breaks.
